channel.title: Insurtech on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Insurtech on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: From Bets to Hard Utility: Why Prediction Markets are the Next Frontier of Insurance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the convergence of prediction markets and parametric insurance as the next frontier for real-time risk management and synthetic reinsurance.

item.title: Assured
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Insurtech platform that aggregates protection products from top carriers like Chubb, PGA Sompo, and Etiqa, allowing any digital channel to embed insurance coverage via a single API.

item.title: Newspapers and Insurance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Reflection on parallels between newspapers’ business challenges and the insurance industry’s need to adapt to digital disruption.
